title: A Day of Mourning, and the Wins Come Quiet

mood.label: Uneasy calm 🌥️
mood.summary: Russia's deadliest strike on Kyiv this year and a bombing in Damascus weighed the day down, but a softening jobs report, cautious progress in Doha, and quiet science and health wins kept the wider ledger mixed rather than catastrophic.

style.genre: post-punk / darkwave — a sampled clean-and-tremolo electric guitar tracing a circling phrygian topline over a driving, dub-spaced TR-808 pulse with tape-echo, a low bowed-string pad holding the dread and a plucked upright bass walking under a deep sine sub, with sparse glockenspiel glints for the quiet wins; Eb phrygian's flat second leaning the whole thing toward grief without collapsing — flags at half-staff, but the science still lands

sampleSources: Strudel default library (VCSL, drum machines, sampled keys)
pattern:
stack(
  s("bd ~ bd ~ ~ ~ sd ~, ~ ~ hh ~ ~ hh ~ hh, ~ ~ ~ ~ cp ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.62).room(0.2).delay(0.18).delaytime(0.33),
  note("<[ef3,gf3,bf3] [e3,af3,b3] [df3,gf3,af3] [ef3,gf3,bf3]>").s("gm_electric_guitar_clean").attack(0.01).release(0.6).lpf(sine.range(700,1900).slow(14)).gain(0.3).room(0.34).delay(0.22).delaytime(0.375),
  note("ef2 ef2 b2 df2 gf2 gf2 af2 e2").s("gm_acoustic_bass").lpf(680).gain(0.5).release(0.4),
  note("bf3 ~ ef4 gf4 ~ e4 df4 ~").s("gm_electric_guitar_muted").gain(0.26).room(0.4).off(0.1875, x=>x.gain(0.12).pan(0.72)).delay(0.24).delaytime(0.375).lpf(2200),
  note("<[ef4,gf4] [e4,af4] [df4,gf4] [ef4,bf4]>").s("glockenspiel").gain(0.16).room(0.5).rsize(4).delay(0.2).delaytime(0.5).pan(0.35),
  note("<ef1 e1 df1 ef1>").s("sine").lpf(200).gain(0.42).attack(0.3).release(2.2),
  note("<[ef3,bf3] [b3,e4] [gf3,df4] [ef3,bf3]>").s("gm_string_ensemble_1").attack(1.4).release(3.4).gain(0.14).lpf(sine.range(900,1500).slow(20)).room(0.5)
)

lines: Seventy missiles and the dark full of drones,
Kyiv woke to a count and a city of phones;
flags come down to half a pole in the grey,
and they cancel the music and call it a day.
A cafe in Damascus, a bench near the court,
no one claims the blast but the fear runs the report.
It's a day of mourning, the ledger leans low,
half-staff over Europe where the hard winds blow;
but the wins come quiet, they don't make the crawl —
so hold the small light, it's still light after all.
Fifty-seven thousand jobs, a soft little print,
the rate stays its hand and the market takes the hint;
in a room in Doha they talk it down a notch,
then pause for a funeral and go back on watch.
A hundred and sixty new black holes collide,
a needle holds diabetes three years to the side.
